title: Non-clinical family/advocate orientation layer ("not medical advice", advocate-reviewed)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). A strictly non-clinical orientation layer helps families/advocates read the map; it carries a standing 'not medical advice' notice, source-links every statement, and is patient-advocate reviewed. Any content interpreting a treatment/trial for a patient is removed and redirected to high-risk sibling projects. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Write a strictly non-clinical family/advocate orientation layer with a standing 'This is not medical advice' notice, every statement source-linked, patient-advocate reviewed before publish.
acceptanceCriteria: Strictly non-clinical orientation (who funds/works on Ewing; how to read the map); carries a standing 'This is not medical advice' notice and links every statement to its source.
Patient-advocate reviewed before publish; any content that interprets a treatment/trial for a patient is removed and redirected to the high-risk sibling projects.
output: docs/family-orientation.md non-clinical family/advocate orientation layer, committed via PR.
